title: New Bandai Evangelion Kit models for the Rebuild
display_title: New Bandai Evangelion Kit models for the Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: New Bandai Evangelion Kit models for the Rebuild !             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Jun 04, 2007 4:35 am Hey there , So the guys over bandai haven't been wasting time lately , They're making new Eva kits for the Eva's in the comming movie , What i know is the First movie well have only Eva01 and Eva02 , There's quite a diffrence between the old designs and the new ones .. The Old Eva00 ( Ikuto yamshita design ) The New Bandai Eva00 ( Probably Hideaki Anno's creation ) Item name : Evangelion-00 New Movie Ver. Manufacturer : Bandai Scale : Non Series : Evangelion Release Date : Aug Regular Price : 3,500 Personal Opinion : Oh my GOD ! The New design looks so HOT ! The white armor over the head covers much more space right now , I've always loved the way 00 looked like it's head looks so smart . I Guess i'll pre-order this kit today ! The white armor even looks better than the yellow it gives a good contrast ,The gray hands blind good with the whole body . The Old Eva01 Design ( Ikuto yamshita design + Anno's) The New One ( Anno's again Probably ) [Back] Evangelion-01 New Movie Ver. Item name : Evangelion-01 New Movie Ver. Manufacturer : Bandai Scale : Non Series : Evangelion Release Date : Aug Regular Price : 3,800 yen Sales Price : 3,610 yen Personal Opinion : Not that much diffrence , Only the shoulder thing , I am guessing all the stereo type eva fans were crazy over the old one lol , Again looks cool , Waiting for more pictures . Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Mon Jun 04, 2007 4:42 am Very nice, but something that bugs me is the amount of white on 00's leg. It's too white!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Jun 04, 2007 4:50 am lol , Yes i've noticed that too ! , I Just can't imagine it in yellow , So it looks okay anyway .

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jun 04, 2007 10:53 am Is it just me, or do those look really CGI?

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Mon Jun 04, 2007 12:41 pm Here's some photos of new Evas too. Unit zero is looks more stylish. Armour-perineum of Unit 01 is convex too clearly. But it have a round-shoulders, and is looks like a beast =)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 04, 2007 1:36 pm I personally love the new designs. I haven't bought an Eva toys in quite some time, but I might have to pick up the new Zerogouki. I love the new look.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Mon Jun 04, 2007 4:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I personally love the new designs. I haven't bought an Eva toys in quite some time, but I might have to pick up the new Zerogouki. I love the new look.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 04, 2007 6:08 pm @ topic: the image of the old Zero prototype is a broken link/image. :( Anyone have a fixed pic of it?

[]:             Quote Post by EVA Does It Best » Mon Jun 04, 2007 7:01 pm personally i like the new designs. They're not drastically different, but different enough to make it fresh. i like the new "glow in the dark" look for Unit-01, and i do enjoy a different color unit-00, but i liked the blue in the original eva.

[]:             Quote Post by crithit5000 » Tue Jun 05, 2007 12:29 am Is it just me, or did they shove an arm from some random He-Man figure onto the first image of 00?

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Tue Jun 05, 2007 12:38 am crithit5000 wrote: Is it just me, or did they shove an arm from some random He-Man figure onto the first image of 00?

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Tue Jun 05, 2007 3:09 am OMG! In original, after the operation Yashima Eva-00 was repainted from the orange into a blue... and now, the actual need in changing are nothing. Although ... What will be, will be what?!

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Tue Jun 05, 2007 3:34 am I've pre-ordered both kits + One Magi System keychain 2-3 days ago , If anyone wants to try these kits out THIS YEAR .. Good luck . The Eva monkey : This is not a Fixed figure or a Toy , It's a Model kit , You have to build it and well color it in some parts . :P OMG! In original, after the operation Yashima Eva-00 was repainted from the orange into a blue... and now, the actual need in changing are nothing. Although ... What will be, will be what?!

[]:             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Thu Jun 07, 2007 7:54 pm NAveryW wrote: Is it just me, or do those look really CGI?
